creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->feedback

I have run this patch at the same time as ports/164847.  There are 6 
regressions, but I do not yet know which patch is responsible.  (I will 
attempt to continue to narrow it down). 

Here are the failures.  I have confirmed that it is one of these two 
patches that causes the problem. 

I would appreciate any help in narrowing this down.  Thanks. 

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9-exp.20120827231257.pointyhat-west/acrobatviewer-1.1_2.log 
http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9-exp.20120827231257.pointyhat-west/codeworker-4.2.log 
http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9-exp.20120827231257.pointyhat-west/ja-edict-utf-8-20100420.log

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.9-exp.20120827231257.pointyhat-west/swt-3.5.2_1.log
